elder_rowan.name: Elder Rowan
elder_rowan.defaultDialog: The forest road must stay open for trade.

captain_brenn.name: Captain Brenn
captain_brenn.defaultDialog: Bandits watch these woods. Keep your steel close.

innkeeper_lora.name: Innkeeper Lora
innkeeper_lora.defaultDialog: Rest a while. Need supplies? I keep a stock of potions and remedies.

blacksmith_kael.name: Blacksmith Kael
blacksmith_kael.defaultDialog: Need something forged? I've got good steel.

banker_tomas.name: Banker Tomas
banker_tomas.defaultDialog: Your valuables are safe with me. Need to make a deposit?

miner_gruff.name: Miner Gruff
miner_gruff.defaultDialog: The earth holds riches for those bold enough to dig. Need a pickaxe?

logger_thorne.name: Logger Thorne
logger_thorne.defaultDialog: Good timber doesn't fell itself. I've got the tools you need.

fisherman_wade.name: Fisherman Wade
fisherman_wade.defaultDialog: Nothing beats a day by the water. Looking for a rod?
